## Details

A detailed description of the page you need, where it will go on the website, how it will be used, how it should look, etc. Be detailed here.

## Colors

If the colors differ from the color palette of the website, explain it here.

## Page link

Link to the page where this design will appear. If a link is not needed or relevant, explain why.

## Example screenshot

If a screenshot with your notes or to the original Balto Source could be useful for the artist to understand the request, provide them.

## Technical details

If there are technical details that you need to explain, do so here. Like transparency, assets, etc. Notice that for the majority of cases, a web designer should be free to decide on the design matters themselves as long as the design is c oherent with the rest of the website.
